description: A legacy trading monolith is being migrated to Kubernetes. Modify the 'trading-monolith' deployment in the 'legacy-migration' namespace to implement its strict infrastructure requirements. Configure static hostAliases for 198.51.100.15 (clearinghouse.local) and 198.51.100.16 (audit.local). Set the dnsPolicy to 'None' and provide a custom dnsConfig with nameservers 1.1.1.1 and 1.0.0.1, search domains 'trading.internal' and 'finance.internal', and the 'ndots' option set to 2. Update the 'fast-cache' volume to use a RAM disk by setting its emptyDir medium to 'Memory' with a sizeLimit of 512Mi. The full specification is available at /home/ga/Desktop/migration_spec.md. Ensure the deployment successfully rolls out and pods return to a Running state.
